title: rubus × semiadscitus
intro: Rubus × semiadscitus, also known as the black raspberry, is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between Rubus idaeus (red raspberry) and Rubus occidentalis (black raspberry). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × semiadscitus include its potential to reduce the risk of certain cancers, improve cardiovascular health, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and arthritis. Rubus × semiadscitus is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
